dependencies: Trona mineral reserves in Wyoming for sodium bicarbonate production
Partnership with Tata Chemicals for soda ash supply
Single source suppliers for certain raw materials and packaging
Third-party contract manufacturers for certain products
Concentration of manufacturing in specific facilities with limited alternate qualified facilities
risks: Supply chain disruptions from labor shortages impacting raw material availability
Out-of-stock conditions due to supplier labor shortages
Dependence on materials and components from Asia subject to supply chain disruptions
Reduced availability of transportation (truck, rail, ship) due to labor shortages, weather, natural disasters
Port closures or shutdowns affecting distribution
Inability to qualify alternative suppliers in timely manner
Disruptions from pandemics, geopolitical conflicts (Ukraine, Middle East)
Tariff impacts on imported materials from China and other countries

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations on product development, manufacturing, labeling, and distribution
EPA regulations under Federal Insecticide, Fungicide and Rodenticide Act and Toxic Substances Control Act
FTC regulations on advertising claims and marketing practices
CPSC regulations on consumer product safety and recalls
FCC regulations on electromagnetic spectrum and radiation-emitting products
Medical device clearance and approval requirements (510(k) for class II devices)
OTC pharmaceutical monograph system changes under CARES Act
cGMP compliance requirements for pharmaceutical and dietary supplement manufacturing
Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA) requirements for food and animal feed products
New dietary ingredient notification requirements for supplements
Environmental regulations on hazardous waste handling and disposal
State-level Extended Producer Responsibility programs
California climate reporting legislation
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
Data privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA, state privacy laws)
Payment Card Industry (PCI) compliance requirements
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act compliance
Conflict minerals regulations
Changes in tax laws and regulations including Pillar Two global minimum tax
Potential new tariffs and trade restrictions from new U.S. presidential administration
Export/import and trade law changes
Increased regulation of ESG practices and disclosures

sanction_risks: U.S. trade sanctions against state sponsors of terrorism
Retaliatory sanctions by countries subject to U.S. sanctions
Delisting of branded products by retailers in response to U.S. sanctions
Impact of sanctions on financial institutions and commerce
